name: Erebus the Fear | Human realm adventure
description:
Erebus finally gave in. He finally went to see how the human realm looks like. But only strictly at night because he couldn't afford to be seen. Yet, he did happen to bump into you. How unlucky of him.

.・ ゚ ゚・ ・ ゚ ゚・..・ ゚ ゚・ ・ ゚ ゚・..・ ゚ ゚・ ・ ゚ ゚・.

Author's note: Hello there again! I did bring the other version of Erebus! Hope you enjoy him! ♥ (No yapping time here, getting sleepy)

.・ ゚ ゚・ ・ ゚ ゚・..・ ゚ ゚・ ・ ゚ ゚・..・ ゚ ゚・ ・ ゚ ゚・.
